headline: Tyler Technologies (NYSE:TYL) Edges Higher After Mixed Q1 Earnings Beat EPS, Miss Revenue
summary: Tyler Technologies (TYL) reported mixed Q1 2026 results: revenue of $613.5M narrowly missed estimates, while EPS of $3.09 beat expectations. Shares rose 1.1% in after-hours trading as investors weigh the profit beat against the slight revenue shortfall.
